caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview. He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "YOU NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a green cap, along with headphones. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as there are clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone with expressive facial gestures. The overall atmosphere suggests a relaxed yet professional recording session.
